title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 42.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Turkey,
    Who wept when the weather was murky;
    When the day turned out fine,
    She ceased to repine,
    That capricious Young Lady of Turkey.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 42.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
